lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.

The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior shows visible scratches and minor dents. The interior has moderate wear on the upholstery and floor mats. All major mechanical systems are operational, though some components show signs of age and may require maintenance soon.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has several visible scratches and a few small dents. The interior shows moderate wear with some stains and fading on the seats. All major mechanical systems are currently functional, though some components show age and may require maintenance.

Looking for a rewarding project? This vehicle is ready for its next chapter! While it currently requires significant mechanical work and some cosmetic TLC, it offers a fantastic foundation for any enthusiast looking to bring a classic back to life. It's an honest fixer-upper with great potential for the right owner!

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a dependable daily driver for someone prioritizing utility over aesthetics. The engine remains strong and starts reliably, having been well-maintained mechanically to ensure it stays on the road. However, please note that the exterior shows its age with several noticeable scratches, paint fading on the hood, and a small dent on the rear bumper. Inside, the cabin is clean but shows significant wear on the driver's seat and some staining on the floor mats. While the car is currently roadworthy, the suspension is beginning to feel loose and the tires will likely need replacement within the next few thousand miles. It is a functional, honest vehicle that reflects its years of service.

This vehicle is in truly impeccable, showroom condition. The exterior paint is flawless with a deep, mirror-like finish, having been kept in a climate-controlled environment and never exposed to harsh weather. Inside, the upholstery is pristine, showing absolutely no wear, and the cabin still retains a fresh, new-car feel. Every electronic feature and mechanical component functions perfectly, exactly as it did the day it was manufactured. This car has been meticulously maintained with a documented service history and represents a rare opportunity for a collector or enthusiast to own a factory-quality example that requires zero investment.

Presenting an uncompromising example of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, having been maintained to the highest standards of mechanical and aesthetic integrity. A rare find for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, every detail reflects meticulous care and a history of sheltered ownership. This specimen offers a driving experience that mirrors its original factory delivery.

Hey there! I’m honestly so excited to show you this absolute gem. It’s in total showroom condition—seriously, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the lot! I’ve babied this car since day one, so it’s completely flawless inside and out. If you’re looking for a ride that’s been loved and kept in pristine shape, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you won’t be disappointed!

This E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of the S54-powered era, presented in verified mint condition. The high-revving 3.2L straight-six features individual throttle bodies and a precision-tuned Double-VANOS variable valve timing system, ensuring optimal torque delivery up to its 7,900 RPM redline. The drivetrain is anchored by a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a variable M-differential lock for superior power distribution. Critical preventative maintenance, including rod bearing replacement and rear subframe reinforcement, has been meticulously performed to exceed OEM standards. The suspension geometry is perfectly dialed, maintaining a flat cornering attitude without compromising compliance. With zero mechanical lash and an immaculate undercarriage, this specimen offers a visceral, analog driving experience that is increasingly rare.
Pristine vehicle. Mint condition. Zero mechanical issues. Original factory paint. Smoke-free interior. Detailed maintenance records included.

Offered here is an absolute gem of automotive preservation, presented in breathtaking, showroom-quality condition. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster with absolutely zero swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections. Every body panel is perfectly aligned, and the factory alloy wheels are completely free of curb rash, currently wrapped in premium tires with nearly full tread depth. Inside, the cabin remains a pristine sanctuary; the leather upholstery is supple and matte, showing no signs of creasing or bolsters wear, and the original 'new car' scent is still present. Every electronic feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the premium infotainment system, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach, having been exclusively serviced at authorized dealerships with a comprehensive folder of maintenance records included. The engine bay is meticulously detailed and spotless, reflecting the pride of ownership. Always garage-kept under a soft cover and never driven in inclement weather, this is quite simply the finest example currently available on the market. A turnkey masterpiece for the discerning enthusiast who accepts nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring an interior and exterior in pristine, showroom-level state. Every detail has been meticulously scrutinized to ensure it meets the requirements of the most discerning collector. This is an investment-grade opportunity for those who demand excellence without concession.

Presenting an exceptional vehicle of unrivaled caliber. This specimen has been maintained to the highest standards, exhibiting showroom-quality aesthetics and flawless mechanical integrity. Every detail reflects a commitment to excellence, offering the discerning buyer an acquisition indistinguishable from new. This is a rare opportunity to secure a vehicle in truly impeccable, investment-grade condition.

Hey there! I’m honestly so excited to show you this car—it’s an absolute dream and in truly stunning condition. It’s been pampered its whole life, always garage-kept, and honestly looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor. You won’t find a single scratch or hiccup here! If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the 'new car' sticker shock, this is the one for you. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Offering a superlative E46 M3 in collector-grade condition. This example features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, utilizing individual throttle bodies and high-pressure double-VANOS timing to deliver a linear power band up to an 8,000 RPM redline. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides tactile, precise engagement, paired with a limited-slip variable M differential lock for optimal torque distribution. This chassis has received preventative subframe reinforcement and a comprehensive VANOS overhaul to ensure mechanical longevity. The suspension remains factory-spec with refreshed bushings and Bilstein dampers, maintaining the original handling dynamics. Finished in Carbon Black with zero paint defects, the exterior shows deep luster, while the interior Nappa leather remains supple and free of bolster wear. Mechanically flawless with a documented service history and perfect compression across all cylinders.
Mint condition. Single owner. Zero accidents. Garage kept. Full service history included. Professionally detailed.

This vehicle is a true showroom masterpiece, preserved in flawless condition and maintained to the highest possible standard. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster with absolutely no chips, swirls, or imperfections, while the interior remains factory-fresh, featuring supple, unmarked leather and that unmistakable new-car scent. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, boasting a documented full service history and having been stored exclusively in a climate-controlled garage. Every button, seal, and component functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Complete with all original keys, manuals, and a spotless history report, this is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector to own a perfect example of automotive excellence.

Presented for your consideration is an exceptional vehicle of unrivaled caliber. This specimen has been maintained to an exacting, showroom-standard, exhibiting a level of preservation that defies its tenure. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a commitment to automotive excellence. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than the absolute pinnacle of quality, this vehicle represents a rare acquisition opportunity. We invite you to experience a standard of refinement that is truly beyond reproach.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, having been preserved to the most exacting standards. With an exterior finish that retains its original luster and an interior entirely devoid of wear, this offering represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector. We invite you to experience a standard of excellence that transcends the typical pre-owned market.

Hey there! I’m honestly so excited to show you this absolute gem. It’s been pampered since day one and looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! Everything is in pristine shape, inside and out—it's truly a dream to drive. If you’re looking for a ride that feels brand new without the dealership headache, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin, you’re gonna love it!
Presenting a collector-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) featuring the iconic S54 3.2L inline-
Mint condition. Single owner. Zero scratches. Interior like new. All maintenance up to date. Runs perfectly.

Presenting a truly exceptional, collector-grade vehicle that stands as a testament to meticulous ownership. This car is in showroom condition, having been exclusively stored in a climate-controlled garage and hand-washed to preserve its flawless factory paint. The interior is pristine, featuring supple leather with no signs of wear, functioning electronics that perform like new, and a cabin that remains completely smoke-free. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, with a comprehensive service history documented solely through authorized dealerships. With remarkably low mileage and zero cosmetic or mechanical imperfections, this vehicle offers a 'new car' experience for the most discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are proud to present this superlative vehicle, preserved in impeccable showroom condition. This specimen has been curated with fastidious attention to detail, showing no evidence of previous use and performing to the exacting standards of its original manufacture. An acquisition of this caliber is rare, offering the most discerning clientele an opportunity to possess a vehicle of unrivaled integrity and aesthetic perfection. Inspection will confirm its status as a premier example of the marque.

Presenting a peerless example of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom-state condition, reflecting a history of meticulous preservation and zero compromise. Every surface, mechanical component, and electronic system functions with the precision of a factory-new unit. This is an investment-grade acquisition for the discerning driver who demands nothing short of perfection.

Hey there! I am so excited to show you this absolute gem. Honestly, it’s in such incredible shape, it feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this car since day one, and it drives like an absolute dream. You really have to see it in person to believe how pristine it is—it's basically flawless. If you're looking for that brand-new feel, this is the one for you. Come say hi and take it for a spin!
This E46 M3 showcases the high-revving S54B32 inline-six, featuring factory individual throttle bodies and a perfectly calibrated double-VANOS variable
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Service records included. Clean title.

Presenting an absolute masterpiece for the most discerning buyer. This vehicle is in breathtaking, showroom condition, having been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled environment since its initial purchase. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, free of any swirls, chips, or imperfections, and is further preserved by a high-end ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of perfection; the upholstery is taut and unmarked, the dashboard is pristine, and it still carries that distinctive new-car aroma. Every mechanical component functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line, backed by a comprehensive, no-expense-spared service history from authorized specialists. This is a rare chance to acquire a 'time capsule' vehicle that looks, feels, and drives like it just left the dealership floor. Complete with all original keys, manuals, and documentation.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained to the most exacting standards of excellence. This specimen exhibits an impeccable exterior finish paired with an interior that remains in showroom condition, reflecting a history of fastidious care. Engineered for the discerning driver who demands uncompromising quality and aesthetic perfection, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine example of automotive craftsmanship.
